[From MAX-CHEATS.com by optantic for Xenoblade Chronicles 2 Torna The Golden Country 1.0.0]

[999999999 GP]
580f0000 01424838
780f0000 00000020
640f0000 00000000 3B9AC9FF

[Lora Team Max HP 9999]
580f0000 01424838
780f0000 00126EBE
620f0000 00000000 0000270f

[Lora Team Max Stats]
580f0000 01424838
780f0000 00126EC0
680f0000 03e703e7 03e703e7
780f0000 00000008
620f0000 00000000 000003e7

[Lora 9999999 Skill Point]
580f0000 01424838
780f0000 00126EE0
640f0000 00000000 0098967f

[Lora 9999999 WP]
580f0000 01424838
780f0000 001348F8
640f0000 00000000 0098967f

[Jin 9999999 WP]
580f0000 01424838
780f0000 00129960
640f0000 00000000 0098967f

[1st Character Infinite Battle HP]
580f0000 016a9a28
580f1000 00000050
780f0000 00000014
620f0000 00000000 0000xxxx

[2nd Character Infinite Battle HP]
580f0000 016a9a28
580f1000 000000A0
780f0000 00000014
620f0000 00000000 0000xxxx

[3rd Character Infinite Battle HP]
580f0000 016a9a28
580f1000 000000F0
780f0000 00000014
620f0000 00000000 0000xxxx

xxxx = set HP input value must not more than your characters Max HP
will update cheat if TX adds function for copying value from another address

[1st Character Infinite Battle HP]
580F0000 016A9A28
580F1000 00000050
780F0000 00000014
620F0000 00000000 0000

[3rd Character Infinite Battle HP]
580F0000 016A9A28
580F1000 000000F0
780F0000 00000014
620F0000 00000000 0000XXXX
XXXX = SET HP INPUT VALUE MUST NOT MORE THAN YOUR CHARACTERS MAX HP
WILL UPDATE CHEAT IF TX ADDS FUNCTION FOR COPYING VALUE FROM ANOTHER ADDRESS

580F0000 01424838
780F0000 001348F8
640F0000 00000000 0098967F
